description.description: Brief description (2-3 sentences) of what this documentation is about

sections.description: Array of documentation sections with hierarchical numbering (1, 1.1, 2, 2.1, etc.). Maximum 10 sections total.

code_references.description: Array of code reference IDs mentioned in this section (must match IDs in code_references array)

subsections.description: Optional array of subsections (same structure as sections)

code_references.description: Array of code reference IDs (referenceId strings) ONLY. Maximum 15 references. Must be actual unique classes, functions, methods from the code (not generic names like 'useEffect'). Simple array like ['processCitation', 'formatCitation']. Full details will be extracted and stored in MongoDB separately.
